training_failure.loss: finite (FailFast did not trigger on loss)

diagnosis: fp32+eager fixed the forward-pass NaN seen in Stream A (bf16). However, with LoRA r=64 alpha=128 LR=2e-4 no-warmup, the first backward pass on Sonnet content produces inf gradient on the B matrix that exceeds fp32 range even after max_grad_norm=0.5 clipping.
candidate_fixes_not_attempted_per_spec_n: lower alpha (e.g., 32) to halve LoRA scaling
